name: Apply Unsharp Mask to Enhance Fine Structure in Eagle Nebula
description: Apply unsharp masking to enhance fine structure in a Hubble Space Telescope image of the Eagle Nebula (Pillars of Creation) located at ~/AstroImages/eagle_enhance/656nmos.fits. Using a Gaussian blur radius (sigma) of 5.0 pixels and a Mask Weight of 0.6, process the image and save the result to ~/AstroImages/eagle_enhance/output/656nmos_unsharp.fits. Document the original and enhanced image statistics (mean, standard deviation, min, max), the contrast enhancement ratio (enhanced_stddev / original_stddev), the brightest peak pixel coordinates (x, y) and value, and the image dimensions in a results file at ~/AstroImages/eagle_enhance/output/enhancement_results.txt.
